text: The 1-gamma node yield ramp is behind plan; defect density on the bitline contact layer requires a revised litho recipe and tighter overlay budget before tape-out.
Attached is the DDR5 PHY RTL drop. The always block for the write-leveling FSM changed; rerun the DRC deck and update the OPC deck before the next mask set release.
Technology roadmap update: HBM4 controller tape-out targets Q3 '26, with EUV dose tuning experiments scheduled on the pilot line through the qual ramp.
SRAM bitcell area shrink for the next die shrink depends on the new design rule waiver; process window analysis shows marginal sense amplifier timing at low voltage.
Do not distribute: the photomask order for the IRONWOOD reticle set includes the revised wordline pitch; fab utilization on the EUV scanners is the bottleneck.
module ddr_phy_top (input clk, input rst_n, output reg ready); always @(posedge clk) begin ready <= ~rst_n; end endmodule
Yield ramp review: row hammer mitigation logic added to the bank group arbiter increased refresh interval pressure; see the updated netlist in ddr5_ctrl.v and layout in top_block.gds.
Internal only — VOLTA-9 product roadmap: sampling in Q1, qualification ramp mid-year, volume production contingent on wafer yield crossing the 80 percent process window target.
The TSV stack qualification for the 3D NAND firmware drop is gated on the cache controller RTL freeze; clone git/nand-fw and run the regression testbench before code review.
Litho recipe v14 raises EUV dose by 4 percent to recover the overlay budget on the storage node mask; defect density projections updated in the tape-out readiness deck.
entity sense_amp is port (bl, blb : in std_logic; q : out std_logic); end entity; -- timing margin on the sense amplifier strobe is the critical path for the bitline read
KESTREL-X design review notes: the SRAM compiler output fails the DRC deck on metal2 spacing; design rule exception filed, mask set hold until the reticle is re-spun.
